ModMetadata.Name: Stationpedia Ascended
ModMetadata.Author: FlorpyDorp
ModMetadata.Description:
This is a Plugin Mod. It requires BepInEx to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
An enhanced Stationpedia experience with comprehensive tooltips, in-game notepad, guides, bug fixes, and quality of life improvements. Stationpedia on a new level.
NEW IN 0.8.7: - Fix: Closing the Station Notepad no longer removes your mouse cursor when another window (Stationpedia, in-game menu) is still open
NEW IN 0.8.6: - Search Fixes: Cable Coil, Corn, and other items now appear correctly in search - Search: "Starts With" category properly shows all matching items - Search: Partial word matches properly demoted, performance optimized - Code: Consolidated dual init paths eliminating Workshop vs ScriptEngine feature drift - Header title reliably shows "Stationpedia Ascended" on first load - Debug: Centralized logging system for development builds
Features: - Enhanced Tooltips: Hover over logic types, slots, memory, modes, and connections - Operational Details: Dedicated section showing advanced device information - In-Game Notepad: Take notes that persist across game sessions (F2 to toggle) - Comprehensive Guides: Survival, Power, Airlock, AC, and more - Bug Fixes: Fixed scrollbar handle and window dragging crashes
All tooltips and descriptions are customizable via descriptions.json.
Discord: https://discord.gg/stationeers
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v0.8.7: Hotfix - Notepad cursor - FIX Station Notepad: closing the notepad no longer removes your mouse cursor when another window (Stationpedia, in-game menu) is still open. The notepad now registers as a proper game modal so the cursor is managed by the game. v0.8.6: Search Fixes & Code Consolidation - FIX Search: Cable Coil, Corn, and other items now appear correctly in search results - FIX Search: Items hidden by HideInStationpedia no longer incorrectly excluded from search - FIX Search: "Starts With" category now properly shows all matching items - FIX Search: Partial word matches properly demoted in results - OPT Search: Single-pass bucketing, caching, pre-allocated lists for faster ordering - FIX Code: Consolidated dual init paths (ScriptEngine vs SLP/Workshop) - FIX Code: Header title reliably shows "Stationpedia Ascended" on first load - FIX Code: Logo icon enlarged and repositioned to avoid text overlap - NEW Debug: Centralized debug logging system with SPDA_DEBUG toggle v0.8.5: Content & Notepad Improvements - FIX Station Notepad: Input now properly locks keyboard while typing - FIX Station Notepad: Enter key no longer opens chat while editing - FIX Station Notepad: JSON documents display correctly on hotload - NEW Species Survival Guide: Lung damage and suffocation mechanics from game code - NEW Species Survival Guide: Mood & Hygiene section with thresholds and effects - FIX Content: Corrected gas terminology (no X3/X1, using Volatiles/Pollutant/Hydrogen) - NEW Editor: Import JSON button for importing guide files - NEW Editor: Drag-and-drop to move content between categories - NEW Editor: Inline section headers within categories - FIX In-Game: Guides and mechanics display in correct JSON order v0.8.0: Major Feature Release - Station Notepad, Guides, Media Support - NEW Station Notepad: In-game note-taking with folders, rich text, Stationpedia links - NEW Survival Manual: Complete beginner's guide (First 5 Minutes to Advanced) - NEW Game Mechanics: Smelting Guide and Species Survival Guide from game code - NEW Media Support: Embed videos and images in Stationpedia pages - NEW Nested TOC: Multi-level table of contents with smooth scrolling - Vanilla/Ascended Mode: Click header to toggle (easter egg) - Multiple guides: Power Systems, Airlock, Air Conditioning, Daylight Sensor v0.3.0: AIMeE documentation, multi-column TOC, new JSON schema features v0.2.2: Search optimizations, property tooltips, IC10 helpers v0.2.1: Enhanced search with smart grouping, visual headers, debris filtering v0.1.x: Initial releases with tooltips, operational details, bug fixes
ModMetadata.InGameDescription:
<size="30"><color=#ffa500>Stationpedia Ascended</color></size> <color=#ff0000>This is a Plugin Mod. It requires BepInEx to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin.</color> See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
An enhanced Stationpedia experience with in-game notepad, comprehensive guides, tooltips, and quality of life improvements.
<color=#ffa500>What's New in 0.8.7:</color> - Fix: Closing the Station Notepad no longer removes your mouse cursor when another window is still open
<color=#ffa500>0.8.6:</color> - Search Fixes: Cable Coil, Corn, and other items appear correctly - Search: Starts With category properly shows all matching items - Search performance optimized with caching and single-pass bucketing - Code: Consolidated dual init paths, reliable header on first load
<color=#ffa500>Features:</color> - Hover tooltips for logic types, slots, memory, modes - In-game notepad with folders and rich text (F2) - Comprehensive guides: Survival, Power, Airlock, AC - Stationpedia links in notes: {LINK:DeviceKey;Text} - Fixes for scrollbar handle and window dragging bugs - Click "Stationpedia" header for Ascended mode
All content customizable via descriptions.json.
